name: m1_code_security
description: Metroid Game Project with Security Configuration - ゲーム開発とセキュリティの統合

scripts.security:full: npm run security:audit && npm run security:test
scripts.dev:full: npm run security:test && npm run game
scripts.build: echo 'Building for production...' && npm run security:audit
scripts.build:secure: npm run security:full && npm run build
scripts.test: echo 'Run npm run security:test for security testing' && exit 0
